init_eqs_str: a['decay_rate'] = 0; a['q1'] = 0; a['prev_beat'] = 0; a['is_beat'] = 0; a['min_att'] = 0; a['beat'] = 0; a['decay_to'] = 0; a['q2'] = 0; a['beat_level'] = 0;
frame_eqs_str: a['decay_rate']=pow(0.993, a['fps']); a['min_att']=2.5; a['decay_to']=1.0; a['beat']=div(a['bass'],Math.max(a['min_att'], a['bass_att'])); a['beat']=Math.max(a['beat'], div(a['mid'],Math.max(a['min_att'], a['mid_att']))); a['beat']=Math.max(a['beat'], div(a['treb'],Math.max(a['min_att'], a['treb_att']))); a['beat']=Math.max(a['beat'], (((a['prev_beat']-a['decay_to'])*a['decay_rate'])+a['decay_to'])); a['beat_level']=(((a['beat']-a['prev_beat'])-0.07)*24); a['is_beat']=above(a['beat_level'], 0.5); a['prev_beat']=a['beat']; a['q1']=a['beat_level']; a['q2']=a['is_beat'];
